name: preset-diagnostic-march-steps
description: Penumbra ADR 0011 — 'diagnostic-march-steps' preset. Heatmap of march-step counts per pixel.

setup.vlmDescription: An SDF teapot rendered as a step-count heatmap: red where many march steps were needed (thin features, near-tangent rays), blue where few (deep interior or open background). No PBR shading visible.
